---
title: Testing the pseudobulk differential expression pipeline
date: 2023-09-06
metadata-files: 
  - _metadata.yml
  - ../_quarto.yml
---

## Goal of this analysis

To test the pseudobulk differential expression pipeline from 2023-08-18 by comparing human UBC vs. RL-SVZ.


## Files and directories

### Code

The code can be found in `<species_dge software directory>/pseudobulk_diff_expr.R>` (same as 2023-08-29 with the addition of the UBC vs. RL-SVZ). Minor changes to volcano plot as well.

### Output

The output can be found in `<species_dge results directory>/20230829`. The files are essentially the same as in 2023-08-29 except with the additional differential expression test comparing the human RL-SVZ with 

::: {.callout-note}
## Update 2024-02-14

Script was re-run and output was regenerated to fix typo in volcano plot.
:::


## Results

![Volcano plot showing differentially expressed genes between UBC vs. GN. Genes that have a logFC > 0 are upregulated in UBCs and genes that have a logFC < 0 are upregulated in GNs. (Same plot as 2023-08-29 with additional labels.)](/CBL_scRNAseq/results/species_dge/20230906/testing-gn_ubc_volcano.png){#fig-gn-ubc}

![Volcano plot showing differentially expressed genes between UBC vs. RL-SVZ. Genes that have a logFC > 0 are upregulated in UBCs and genes that have a logFC < 0 are upregulated in RL-SVZ.](/CBL_scRNAseq/results/species_dge/20230906/testing-rl_svz_ubc_volcano.png){#fig-rlsvz-ubc}
